text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I'm about to have lunch, I<n>suddenly hear a
very loud voice.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: No, I don't wannaaa! Nuh-uh,nuh-uh! I won't eat my veggies,and you can't make me!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear... How should I deal with this<n>naughty
witch?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I've noticed that you never eat your<n>vegetables,
whether here or at the<n>dorms... As your dorm
leader, I worry<n>that you're not getting enough
vitamins and minerals.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! Green bell peppers and onions<n>are the
sworn enemy of all witches! I<n>don't care what
you say, I'm not<n>eating them!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Sworn enemies, you say? Why yes, I<n>think I've
read a book on this matter<n>before.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Its passages spoke of how witches<n>are familiar
with all manner of plants,<n>including flowers and
vegetables.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Sounds to me like a great witch would<n>be in good
tidings with green bell<n>peppers and onions, don't
you think?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, uh...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Why, this could be an opportunity for<n>you. Surely
acquainting yourself with<n>these veggies will bring
you one step<n>closer to becoming a great witch.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: W-well... Urrrgh!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho's eyes dart around in<n>search of
help, eventually locking with<n>mine.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That's it! Hey, you! You tell me what I<n>should do!
choice_data_list: I think you should eat your vegetables.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wh-why would you say thaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Excellent. Let us begin with the green<n>bell
peppers. "Fair witch, will you be<n>my friend?"

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh, I'll do it, okay?! Just so... I can<n>become a
great witch!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch... Gulp.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Blergh! It's sooo bitter! I knew I<n>shouldn't have
eaten it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Vegetables are supposed to be used<n>for magical
potions and stuff! Why<n>would a witch need to be
friends with<n>them? That doesn't make sense!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yuck, yuck, yuck! I can't get the taste<n>out of my
mouuuuth! WAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... I guess this is where the real<n>battle
begins.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'll bring you some juice, so please...<n>quiet down.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, good choice! You know exactly<n>what to
say! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I've made up my mind—no veggies<n>for Sweepy!
Why be friends with<n>them when I can have my
way with<n>magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Here's what I'll do with them...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'll do this! And even this!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ah... Stop that!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Wah?! Where'd these... v-vegetables<n>come
from?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehe! That solves everything! ♪ See<n>ya!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho makes a run for it after<n>pushing
her vegetables onto<n>Kawakami Princess's plate.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki and Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Come back this instant! Hey, get back<n>here!
